news.title: The smart glasses race is real now
news.summary: The XR market sits at an estimated $10.6 billion in 2026, with augmented reality commanding over 42% of the total market. Major players like Meta, Apple, and Google are gearing up for a platform war in the smart glasses space.
news.content: The smart glasses market is experiencing significant growth, with normal people buying them and normal companies making them. The booths at CES 2026 stretched across an entire hall, indicating the importance of this market. Meta leads with Ray-Ban Meta selling over 7 million units in 2025. Apple has retreated from the market, redirecting resources towards smart glasses similar to Meta's Ray-Bans. Google, with its Android XR platform, aims to commoditize hardware and standardize software, allowing manufacturers to compete on price and design.

news.title: Google's first AR Smart Glasses to launch in 2026
news.summary: Google has revealed details about its upcoming smart glasses running on Android XR, with positive first impressions from journalists who demoed the product.
news.content: Bloomberg and CNN journalists had the chance to demo Google's smart glasses, with the binocular variant offering a more expansive virtual display. The glasses are expected to launch sometime next year and will compete with Meta and possibly Apple in the AI smart glasses market.

news.summary: OpenAI 发布新功能，引发业界广泛关注，标志着人工智能技术在实际应用场景中取得了重要突破。
news.content: 据最新消息，OpenAI 发布新功能，这一进展引发了业界广泛关注。相关专家表示，这标志着人工智能技术在实际应用场景中取得了重要突破。

news.title: Wearables Are Getting FDA Clearances
news.summary: 2025 was the year consumer wearables started getting serious regulatory approval, entering 'Wearables 2.0' — the era of clinical-grade medical devices that look like consumer products.
news.content: In April 2025, WHOOP obtained FDA 510(k) clearance for its ECG feature, moving what was a pure fitness device into medical territory. Dexcom announced FDA clearance for the G7 15-Day CGM System with an improved accuracy of 8.0% MARD — the longest-lasting and most accurate CGM available. Biolinq received FDA De Novo Classification for their Biolinq Shine — a forearm patch that tracks glucose, activity, and sleep for non-insulin type 2 diabetes patients.

news.title: AI Is Moving Onto Your Wrist
news.summary: On-device AI is transforming wearables from data collectors into actual health advisors, with the global wearable AI market projected to grow significantly.
news.content: The shift is from cloud-based processing to edge computing — AI that runs directly on the device. This allows for real-time analytics directly on the device, reducing latency, enhancing privacy, and minimizing energy consumption. Devices can now alert users to abnormal heart rhythms immediately, continuous glucose monitors can predict hypoglycemic episodes before they happen, and wearables can detect stress and suggest interventions in the moment.

news.title: Arm发布AGI专用CPU
news.summary: Arm推出了AGI专用CPU，每颗CPU最多可拥有136个核心，声称其性能功耗比是x86芯片的两倍。
news.content: Arm推出了AGI专用CPU，每颗CPU最多可拥有136个核心，声称其性能功耗比是x86芯片的两倍。这一新硬件旨在为通用人工智能提供更强的计算支持。

news.title: Google推出TurboQuant算法
news.summary: Google发布了新的AI内存压缩算法TurboQuant，可将AI内存速度提升8倍，同时降低50%以上的成本。
news.content: Google发布了新的AI内存压缩算法TurboQuant，声称可将AI内存速度提升8倍，同时降低50%以上的成本。社区成员已将该算法移植到MLX for Apple Silicon和llama.cpp等热门本地AI库中。

news.title: Meta launches display-equipped Ray-Ban glasses
news.summary: Meta launched their display-equipped Ray-Ban glasses in September 2025 at $799, and they sold out within 48 hours due to unprecedented demand.
news.content: Meta's Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses have been the driver in the smart glasses market, with year-over-year sales growing by over 300%. The company faced 'unprecedented' demand and had to delay wider rollout. This indicates a strong market acceptance and the growing popularity of AI glasses with built-in assistants.

news.title: Google partners with Warby Parker for smart glasses
news.summary: Google isn't sitting still in the smart glasses market and has partnered with Warby Parker to expand style options, lowering the fashion barrier.
news.content: Google has partnered with Warby Parker to expand style options for their smart glasses, essentially lowering the fashion barrier that killed Google Glass the first time around. This move indicates Google's strategy to make their smart glasses more appealing and fashionable to a wider audience.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS 2.4.0 released with new features
news.summary: The Zephyr project has released version 2.4.0 of their RTOS, which includes new features and improvements for embedded systems.
news.content: The Zephyr project, a popular RTOS for embedded systems, has released version 2.4.0. This new version includes various new features and improvements that enhance the functionality and performance of embedded systems. The release is a significant update for the Zephyr community and developers working on IoT and other embedded applications.

news.title: RT-Thread 5.0 release brings significant updates
news.summary: RT-Thread, a real-time operating system, has released version 5.0, which includes major updates and new features for IoT devices.
news.content: RT-Thread 5.0 has been released, bringing significant updates to the real-time operating system. This version includes major enhancements and new features that cater to the needs of IoT devices, making it more powerful and flexible for developers working on smart devices and embedded systems.

news.title: Trevor Milton raises funds for a new jet
news.summary: Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet he claims will transform flying, marking a new direction in AI-enabled transportation.
news.content: Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet that he claims will transform flying. This development indicates a continued push towards integrating AI into transportation and could potentially revolutionize the aviation industry.
